RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROWINA NG'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is denied with 5 days to respond to the complaint. Plaintiff has shown valid substitute service. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB)

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Cohen, Esq., 800-492-2657 for plaintiff and opposing party U.S. Bank, National Association as Trustee

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE AND RULED AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT ROWINA NG'S Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 21, 2010 DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S FILED OPPOSITION. PLAINTIFF IS DIRECTED TO SUBMIT COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION TO THE CLERK AND ADVISE THE MOVING PARTY OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
